reservation.source_phrase: Tickets are sold in-person during our slower seasons, although the museum recommends purchasing online to secure admission.
reservation.source_block:
Tickets are sold in-person during our slower seasons, although the museum recommends purchasing online to secure admission.

Tickets are sold online only in October and are available for purchase at 10:00PM for the following day .

The museum offers presentations every half-hour with a check-in time fifteen minutes listed fifteen minutes before the start. For example, the listed time of 9:45AM is the check-in time for the 10:00AM presentation. Please allow up to one hour for your visit.
